chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-2020 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 21.12.2016. Mr. Shoukat Ali Kaka, Advocate alongwith petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G a/w SIP Ali Gul Kerio SHO Khyberrani and SIP Jan Muhammad SHO Sekhat himself and o/b of SSP Matiari. = Today, parawise comments have been filed by the learned A.A.G, whereunder, in paragraph No.4 it is stated that there is dispute in respect of agricultural land between petitioner and private respondents. Today, respondent No.4-Muhammad Ramzan, the Police Constable and respondent No.5-Akkag Wasayo (actual name Allah Wasayo) appeared alongwith other private respondents namely, Akram, Idrees, Kamal, Ayaz and Sajjad and have undertaken that they have neither in the past nor in future will cause any harassment to the petitioner nor will extend threat to him. However, respondent No.5-Allah Wasayo states that petitioner also is trying to take undue advantage of the common agricultural land. In this regard, parties can seek remedy before any competent fora including the revenue authorities and if an application in this regard is filed before the concerned Mukhtiarkar, he will take necessary action within three weeks of the filing of such an application, but strictly in accordance with law and without favouring any individual/petitioner or respondents. With these observations and directions, the present petition stands disposed of. However, any violation of the order will be construed as disobedience of the Court order and adverse consequences may follow.

With these observations and directions, the present petition stands disposed of. However, any violation of the order will be construed as disobedience of the Court order and adverse consequences may follow. JUDGE Shahid
